title: Nerd Happy Ghasts!
description: Turns the Happy Ghast and the Ghastling into nerds!
body:
## Erm... Actually!!☝️🤓

**► Turns the Happy Ghast and the Ghastling into nerds!**

![New Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38713c93a297b3eda82a71980c898d18e3a24445.png)

**✦ You can name your Ghast and change its appearance!**

![names](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4022c4ccf9584f816b0335817ee814ae2f96599.png)

**■ [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) (Fabric) or [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) (Forge) Required for this Feature.**

**✦ Look at them go!**

![Them](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9aa629cbce8971fbc9be13ce938c40b63314b4ca.jpeg)

**■ Works with Vanilla Minecraft.**
